scripts.test:smoke: set TOTAL_USERS=5&& set DURATION_MINUTES=1&& set HEADLESS=false&& npx tsx src/runner.ts
scripts.test:load: set TOTAL_USERS=100&& set DURATION_MINUTES=3&& set HEADLESS=true&& npx tsx src/runner.ts
scripts.test:actual: set TOTAL_USERS=500&& set DURATION_MINUTES=60&& set HEADLESS=true&& npx tsx src/runner.ts
